list.name: Changes
list.comment: switched Notification Microservice from spring boot to python & Rust

task.summary: Started working on the resources microservice
Started working on the resources microservice
added borrowing books from library logic
loan management is 90% done still working on some bugs
switched Notification Microservice from spring boot to python & Rust
